recommendations.overview: An aimless, jobless, irresponsible grown man joins the army and matures into a battlefield hero.

recommendations.title: Don 2
recommendations.overview: Having conquered the Asian underworld, crime boss Don sets in motion a plan that will give him dominion over Europe.

recommendations.title: Zindagi Na Milegi Dobara

recommendations.title: Gabriel's Inferno
recommendations.overview: An intriguing and sinful exploration of seduction, forbidden love, and redemption, Gabriel's Inferno is a captivating and wildly passionate tale of one man's escape from his own personal hell as he tries to earn the impossible--forgiveness and love.

recommendations.title: 365 Days
recommendations.overview: A woman falls victim to a dominant mafia boss, who imprisons her and gives her one year to fall in love with him.

recommendations.title: Qué León
recommendations.overview: A love story between a couple with the same last name but very different social statuses.
